videos.headline: Zevi Eckhaus lasers 32-YD TD to Joshua Meredith
videos.description: Zevi Eckhaus throws 32 yards to Joshua Meredith for a Washington State touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Zevi Eckhaus lasers 32-YD TD to Joshua Meredith) 2025/10/18 ESHEET

videos.headline: Cam Ross skirts defenders for a Cavaliers TD
videos.description: Cam Ross scores on a 19-yard Virginia rushing touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Cam Ross skirts defenders for a Cavaliers TD) 2025/10/18 ESHEET

videos.headline: Harrison Waylee flies in for a Virginia TD
videos.description: Harrison Waylee breaks the plane for a touchdown as Virginia reduces its deficit to three.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Harrison Waylee flies in for a Virginia TD) 2025/10/18 ESHEET

videos.headline: Virginia takes a late lead with safety
videos.description: Virginia's defense tackles Kirby Vorhees for a loss which results in a safety and a 22-20 advantage.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Virginia takes a late lead with safety) 2025/10/18 ESHEET
